import axiosInstance from'./axiosInstance';/**
 * Auth API calls — thin wrappers that return the full Axios response
 * so callers can access response.data directly.
 */const authService={register:payload=>axiosInstance.post('/api/auth/register',payload),login:payload=>axiosInstance.post('/api/auth/login',payload),logout:()=>axiosInstance.post('/api/auth/logout'),getCurrentUser:()=>axiosInstance.get('/api/users/me')};export default authService;
